MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-23-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Lawson, Esq. for plaintiff
Allyn Hayes, Manager for San Francisco Housing

Unlawful detainer settlement conference held.
Defendant owes past due rent in the sum of $405. Defendant shall pay $200 1/2/04 and $205 balance at the rate of $20 per month until paid in full.
Defendant will pay $350 for attorney's fees at the rate of $20 per month for 18 months. Said payment of attorneys fees shall begin in Nov. 2004 After past due rent is paid in full.
Eviction will proceed if terms are breached. If defendant fail to surrender, Plaintiff may, with enter judgment by ex parte declaration.
JPT: Alexander Anolik Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Patricia Van Steenberge. (218)
